compiled_state.title: RED test: structural boundary test for stage-boundary-preconditions doc files
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
This task writes the structural boundary test for the stage-boundary-preconditions documentation artifact. Per Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5: test the structural boundary, not the content. The test verifies that required documentation files exist with required section headings — it runs RED before the doc files are created.

## TDD Requirement
Write `tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-doc-structure.sh`:
- Given: the `docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/` directory does not yet exist
- When: the test checks for existence of 5 required doc files and their required headings
- Then: test fails (RED) because no files exist

Named failing tests:
- `test_schema_reference_exists_with_required_sections` — asserts `docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/schema-reference.md` exists and contains headings for minimal, standard, and deep tier sections plus a schema_version policy heading
- `test_validator_guide_exists_with_required_sections` — asserts `docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/validator-guide.md` exists and contains depth-agnostic contract heading and self-verification heading
- `test_consumer_guide_exists_with_required_sections` — asserts `docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/consumer-guide.md` exists and contains `_read_latest_preconditions` heading and LWW heading
- `test_ops_runbook_exists_with_required_sections` — asserts `docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/ops-runbook.md` exists and contains FP auto-fallback heading, compaction timing heading, and diagnostic log formats heading
- `test_pinned_contracts_exists_with_six_invariants` — asserts `docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/pinned-contracts.md` exists and contains all 6 invariants (LWW, depth-agnostic, self-verification, schema_version, compaction ordering, FP auto-fallback scope)

## Implementation Notes
- Use the pattern established in `tests/test-install-doc-contract.sh` — bash test with pass()/fail() helpers
- Set executable bit: `chmod +x tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-doc-structure.sh`
- Use `test -f` for file existence; `grep -q` for heading presence
- Test for section headings using `##` heading prefix matching
- Test for p95 latency budget section in ops-runbook.md
- Do NOT test specific content values — only structural boundary presence

## File Impact
- `tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-doc-structure.sh` — Create

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-doc-structure.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-doc-structure.sh
- [ ] Test file contains all 5 named test functions (one per doc file)
  Verify: grep -c "test_.*_exists_with" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-doc-structure.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Test exits non-zero when doc files do not exist (confirms RED phase)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-doc-structure.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] Test uses structural boundary checks (grep for headings), not content checks
  Verify: grep -q "grep -q\|test -f" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-doc-structure.sh
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_schema_reference_exists_with_required_sections] for docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/schema-reference.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_schema_reference_exists_with_required_sections\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
